barRaise.topFinding: Quiet cycle, no movement on the three things that matter. Since 06-03 the only ship is 0.42.2, a single-file putt-wizard PATCH, plus today's scheduled canonical-audit and drift-auto-fix (zero structural drift, two anchor ticks). But all three standing HIGHs survived untouched and the keystone got its predicted harm: write-dashboard-status.ps1 still rebuilds YaC.json from scratch (audit hardcoded 0/0/0, barRaise nulled), so the 0.42.2 release ran it 06-03 and re-blanked the 06-03 bar-raise's own JSON write. Ninth consecutive review of a fifteen-line read-modify-write fix; live JSON still reads barRaise null. Decision 30 still has no body in DECISIONS_NEEDED.md (now six docs cite the phantom), and basket-coord completeness stays ungated (no N7, pin audit still 05-25). Fix the writer first.
